name: Telomerase Restoration Coverage Repair

scope.question: Which known source-completeness gaps for Telomerase Restoration need repair, and does resolving them change the coverage verdict or public boundaries?

summary: Coverage repair staged the high-priority missing context identified by the June 10 surveillance assessment. The staged bundle adds the 2025 TA-65 systematic review and meta-analysis, a complete no-results TA-65 and telomerase-activator registry watchlist, disease-context Libella AAV-hTERT registry boundaries, TERT mRNA radiation-injury boundary context, and a refreshed Telomerase Restoration outlook. The proposed public read keeps evidence_stage human_biomarker_signal, momentum mixed, and confidence low.

materiality_decision.rationale: The repair materially improves the evidence map and future registry-check surface, but every new human registry record remains no-results and the TA-65 synthesis strengthens the biomarker boundary rather than upgrading the stage.

search_log.summary: Confirmed PMID 41286474 as a 2025 TA-65 systematic review and meta-analysis and PMID 40958415 as a 2026 TERT mRNA radiation-injury study. PMID 41002620 was screened as Astragalus vascular-aging review context but not staged because the TA-65 meta-analysis was more direct.

Confirmed all named TA-65, cycloastragenol, and Libella AAV-hTERT registries had no posted results in the API view. The current TA-65 vascular-function registry is not yet recruiting; older TA-65 or telomerase-activator registries are unknown, terminated, or completed with no posted results; Libella AAV-hTERT registries remain unknown status with no posted results.

search_log.source_name: Local public records and prior coverage assessment
search_log.query: Telomerase Restoration outlook, source, study, finding, evidence-review, publication-event, and June 10 surveillance coverage assessment
search_log.summary: Compared the public outlook and evidence audit trail against the coverage gaps from telomerase-restoration-surveillance-2026-06-10. The staged repair changes public context and evidence-map completeness but not the stage assignment.

trial_watch_checks.summary: Unknown-status TA-65MD healthy-volunteer registry with last-known recruiting status, estimated enrollment of 500, estimated completion in 2017, and no posted results.
Terminated phase 1 TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry with actual enrollment of 13 and no posted results.
Completed TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry with estimated enrollment of 40 and no posted results.
Completed cycloastragenol retinal amyloid registry with 48 participants and no posted results; staged as telomerase-activator disease-boundary context rather than direct TA-65 evidence.
Not-yet-recruiting TA-65 microvascular dysfunction registry with estimated enrollment of 180, vascular-function primary endpoint, estimated completion in 2029, and no posted results.
Existing public Libella AAV-hTERT aging registry remains unknown status with last-known recruiting status, estimated enrollment of 5, and no posted results.
Disease-context Libella AAV-hTERT critical limb ischemia registry remains unknown status with estimated enrollment of 5 and no posted results.
Disease-context Libella AAV-hTERT Alzheimer disease registry remains unknown status with estimated enrollment of 5 and no posted results.

excluded_sources.title: Targeting Telomere Shortening in Vascular Aging and Atherosclerosis: Therapeutic Promise of Astragalus membranaceus
excluded_sources.reason: Review-level Astragalus vascular-aging context overlaps with TA-65/cycloastragenol but is less direct than the staged TA-65 systematic review and the active TA-65 vascular registry.

excluded_sources.reference: Telomere-length-only lifestyle, vitamin, or observational records
excluded_sources.reason: The repair focused on telomerase activation or telomerase-therapy records. Telomere-length associations without a telomerase-restoration intervention remain outside this track unless a later taxonomy pass asks for them.

notes: The staged repair intentionally keeps the public evidence stage at human_biomarker_signal.
NCT02530255 was included because the prior watchlist named it, but the API identifies cycloastragenol rather than branded TA-65 as the intervention.
The TERT mRNA paper is staged as boundary context because it reports no telomere-length extension during the experiment.
next_actions: Run source-fidelity, interpretation, safety, and taxonomy review before publishing the staged bundle.
If approved and published, return Telomerase Restoration to ordinary surveillance with the repaired registry watchlist.
